title: MineLabs QuiltPack
body:
**[DE/EN]MineLabs Mod SMP**
---

This Modpack is required to play on [DE/EN]MineLabs Mod Server. 

 

MineLabs focuses on the classic survival mode of Minecraft, which is supplemented with the ingenious mod “Create” by simibubi. This offers a variety of tools and blocks for building, decoration and aesthetic automation. If you can't imagine anything, you should take a look here:

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rR8W-f9YhYA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---
To ensure that the “vanilla experience” remains exciting for long-established Minecraft veterans, the in-house ModPack comes with a variety of small mods that introduce a new twist and interesting mechanics.

Some notable mods:
 
Aquamirae, Better End, Croptopia, Deeper and Darker, Farmer's Delight, YUNG's Mods


With a total of over 150 mods, there is something for everyone!
